_comment: Batch import format for node scripts/cli.js --input init/batch-data.json --type all
_comment2: Add entries here and run the command above to generate .md files in works/, press/, blog/.
_comment3: Omit any optional field rather than leaving it blank.

works.title: Example Work Title
works.summary: Two to three sentence summary of this work. What it argues, in what proceeding, on behalf of whom.
works.body: Optional longer body text. Can be left out.
